violations.text: The floor in the 3-bay area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The floor next to the handsink by the ware washing area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the "storage area" and the area next to the hand sink in the ware washing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
